Container.Name: deploy-guard
Container.Overview: Minimal webhook receiver for safe Docker container updates with automatic rollback. Supports both standalone (Unraid-native) and docker-compose modes. Endpoints: /health, /deploy, /rollback — all token-protected.

Config.Name: Deploy Token
Config.Description: Secret token for all endpoints. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Managed Container
Config.Description: Name of the Docker container to manage

Config.Name: Managed Image
Config.Description: Full image reference to pull on /deploy

Config.Name: Compose File (optional)
Config.Description: Leave empty for standalone mode (recommended for Unraid). Set to /compose/docker-compose.yml to use docker-compose instead.

Config.Name: Compose Service (optional)
Config.Description: Service name in docker-compose.yml — only used when Compose File is set

Config.Name: Port
Config.Description: Webhook port. Binds to all interfaces so claude-works container can reach it. Token-protected — safe to expose on the local network.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket — required for container management

Config.Name: Compose File Mount (compose mode only)
Config.Description: Host path to docker-compose.yml. Only needed if Compose File env var is set.
